glosses.fr: aire de jeux; terrain de jeux
glosses.zh-Hans: 儿童游乐场; 儿童活动区
glosses.yue: 兒童遊樂場; 遊樂區
glosses.hi: बच्चों का खेल का मैदान; खेल क्षेत्र
glosses.ro: loc de joacă; teren de joacă

translations.en: We’re going to the playground soon.
translations.es: Vamos al parque infantil en un rato.
translations.fr: On va bientôt à l’aire de jeux.
translations.it: Tra poco andiamo al parco giochi.
translations.ru: Мы скоро идём на детскую площадку.
translations.pt: Vamos ao parque infantil daqui a pouco.
translations.he: אנחנו הולכים עוד מעט לגן שעשועים.
translations.vi: Chúng ta sắp ra sân chơi.
translations.nl: We gaan zo naar de speeltuin.
translations.uk: Ми скоро підемо на дитячий майданчик.
translations.hi: हम जल्द ही खेल के मैदान जा रहे हैं.
translations.el: Σε λίγο πάμε στην παιδική χαρά.
translations.id: Sebentar lagi kita pergi ke taman bermain.
translations.ro: Mergem curând la locul de joacă.
translations.da: Vi går snart hen til legepladsen.
translations.ja: もうすぐ公園に行くよ。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person plural personal pronoun in nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person plural, expressing motion.
Temporal adverb meaning ‘soon/right away’; modifies the verb phrase.
Dative-governing preposition ‘zu’ contracted with the article ‘dem’; marks direction/goal.
Masculine noun, singular dative as the object of ‘zu(m)’, indicating destination.

sentences.target: Die Kinder toben auf dem Spielplatz.

translations.de: Die Kinder toben auf dem Spielplatz.
translations.en: The kids are running around on the playground.
translations.es: Los niños corretean por el parque infantil.
translations.fr: Les enfants courent partout à l’aire de jeux.
translations.it: I bambini corrono in giro nel parco giochi.
translations.zh-Hans: 孩子们在游乐场里跑来跑去。
translations.yue: 啲小朋友喺遊樂場跑嚟跑去。
translations.pt: As crianças estão a correr pelo parque infantil.
translations.vi: Bọn trẻ đang chạy nhảy ở sân chơi.
translations.nl: De kinderen rennen rond in de speeltuin.
translations.hi: बच्चे खेल के मैदान में इधर-उधर दौड़ रहे हैं.
translations.el: Τα παιδιά τρέχουν στην παιδική χαρά.
translations.id: Anak-anak berlari ke sana kemari di taman bermain.
translations.ro: Copiii aleargă peste tot la locul de joacă.
translations.ja: 子どもたちが公園で走り回っています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative plural; determines the subject noun.
Common noun, plural nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural; denotes lively activity.
Preposition taking dative for location; introduces a locative PP.
Definite article, dative singular masculine; agrees with ‘Spielplatz’ in the PP.
Masculine noun, singular dative as the object of ‘auf’ (locative reading).

sentences.target: Ich warte am Spielplatz neben der Schule.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈvaʁtə am ˈʃpiːlplats ˈneːbən deːɐ̯ ˈʃuːlə/

translations.de: Ich warte am Spielplatz neben der Schule.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈvaʁtə am ˈʃpiːlplats ˈneːbən deːɐ̯ ˈʃuːlə/
translations.en: I’m waiting at the playground next to the school.
translations.es: Estoy esperando en el parque infantil junto a la escuela.
translations.fr: J’attends à l’aire de jeux à côté de l’école.
translations.it: Sto aspettando al parco giochi accanto alla scuola.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在学校旁边的游乐场等着。
translations.yue: 我喺學校旁邊嘅遊樂場等緊。
translations.ru: Я жду на детской площадке рядом со школой.
translations.pt: Estou à espera no parque infantil ao lado da escola.
translations.he: אני מחכה בגן שעשועים ליד בית הספר.
translations.vi: Tôi đang đợi ở sân chơi cạnh trường.
translations.ar: أنا أنتظر في सاحة اللعب بجانب المدرسة.
translations.nl: Ik wacht bij de speeltuin naast de school.
translations.uk: Я чекаю на дитячому майданчику біля школи.
translations.hi: मैं स्कूल के पास वाले खेल के मैदान में इंतज़ार कर रहा हूँ.
translations.pl: Czekam na placu zabaw obok szkoły.
translations.el: Περιμένω στην παιδική χαρά δίπλα στο σχολείο.
translations.nb: Jeg venter ved lekeplassen ved siden av skolen.
translations.id: Aku menunggu di taman bermain di sebelah sekolah.
translations.sv: Jag väntar på lekplatsen bredvid skolan.
translations.ro: Aștept la locul de joacă de lângă școală.
translations.da: Jeg venter ved legepladsen ved siden af skolen.
translations.ja: 学校のそばの公園で待っている。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person singular personal pronoun in nominative; subject.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; intransitive.
Preposition ‘an’ contracted with ‘dem’; dative-governing, marking location.
Masculine noun, singular dative as the object of ‘am’ (an + dem).
Preposition taking dative; introduces a PP indicating adjacency.
Definite article, dative singular feminine; agrees with ‘Schule’ after ‘neben’.
Feminine noun, singular dative as the object of ‘neben’.

sentences.target: Du holst mich vom Spielplatz ab.

translations.de: Du holst mich vom Spielplatz ab.
translations.en: You’re picking me up from the playground.
translations.es: Me recoges en el parque infantil.
translations.fr: Tu viens me chercher à l’aire de jeux.
translations.it: Vieni a prendermi al parco giochi.
translations.ru: Ты забираешь меня с детской площадки.
translations.he: אתה בא לאסוף אותי מהגן שעשועים.
translations.vi: Bạn đến sân chơi đón tôi.
translations.nl: Je haalt me op bij de speeltuin.
translations.uk: Ти забираєш мене з дитячого майданчика.
translations.hi: तुम मुझे खेल के मैदान से लेने आ रहे हो.
translations.el: Έρχεσαι να με πάρεις από την παιδική χαρά.
translations.id: Kamu menjemput aku di taman bermain.
translations.ro: Vii să mă iei de la locul de joacă.
translations.ja: 公園に迎えに来てくれる。

tokens.explanation: 2nd-person singular personal pronoun in nominative; subject.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; part of the separable verb ‘abholen’ (particle at clause end).
1st-person singular personal pronoun in accusative; direct object (person being picked up).
Preposition ‘von’ contracted with ‘dem’; dative-governing, marking source/origin.
Masculine noun, singular dative as the object of ‘vom’ (von + dem).
Separable particle forming the verb ‘abholen’; appears clause-finally.
